title: Smoothie King: 2 employees ‘no longer with the business’ after refusing to serve customer in Trump shirt
author: Ashleigh Fields
fullText: Smoothie King on Monday said two employees are “no longer” with the company after they denied service to a customer in a Trump shirt. “As a brand, Smoothie King is committed to ensuring our stores are a place free of discrimination of any kind, where every guest and team member is treated with care and…
